about.0: XYZ1024 (self-proclaimed "self-learning robot") is a senior nm person. When someone sends a message in the Sakura Frp official group chat, XYZ1024 often responds in the form of "*nm". E.g:
about.3: Subsequently, the founder of nmTeam agou joined the nm army. He called himself an "autonomous nm robot", and carried forward the nm career, so he was removed from the group chat at 14:07 on May 29, 2020.
about.4: When nmTeam was about to be founded, we chose the Chinese expression "Lemon" (or "Nano") for nm.
about.5: All members of our nmTeam are loyal fans of nm, as a basis of which we are working hard to carry forward the nm culture!
about.6: Let us know if you have a heart of nm.
about.7: As long as you have an nm heart, nmTeam welcomes you to join at any time. Please visit this page to learn more.
about.description: Know the meaning and history of nm in this page.
about.h0: Unfortunately, we didn't even think about slogan.
about.h1: Want to know the origin of nm?
about.title: About nmTeam

index.connect_para: Follow our social media and platform accounts to learn more about nmTeam.
index.join_para: If you have a heart of nm, you can join us today.
index.join_para_2: Please visit this page to learn more.
index.newslist_error: An error occored while loading news.
index.nmteam_is_this_a: Established on June 14, 2021, nmTeam is committed to providing people with very nm products and services. nmTeam now has agou as the CEO, and more nmServices will be launched one after another.
index.nmteam_is_this_b: nmTeam may go bankrupt, but it will never deteriorate!
index.what_we_does_ans: nmTeam is committed to making nmProducts. Check out some of our products below.

join_register_page.description: Join nmTeam to carry forward the nm culture with us and build the nm ecology together.
join_register_page.tip: Sorry, the application for joining nmTeam has not been officially opened yet, please check again in two days.
join_register_page.title: Apply to Join nmTeam

join_requirement_page.description: Join nmTeam to carry forward the nm culture with us and build the nm ecology together.

intro.0: Do you know that nmTeam has a harmonious team atmosphere and free management arrangements?
intro.1: Joining nmTeam will be an easy and enjoyable process - your talents will be of great benefit to our latest products, and we can even create exclusive products for you! What's more, your hard work will be rewarded richly, your contribution to nmTeam can also get public praise and a lot of bonuses. After joining nmTeam, even if you don't contribute too much, you will not be criticized. So come and find your favorite job and join nmTeam immediately!

common.basic_morality: Have a basic sense of team responsibility to ensure that the basic morality of the nmTeam creative environment and members is not undermined
common.basic_morality_intro: In some special cases, please understand, nmTeam members are by no means saints, please be tolerant anyway; even if it is unacceptable, please do not destroy nmTeam services and destroy nmTeam data files.
common.friendly_wish: Able to have friendly cooperation with other members
common.nm_heart_intro: Since you are an nmer, you have to understand a little about nm. What do you think about the word "nm"?

developer.additional: Of course, we welcome nmers who are proficient in using Git and have a good grasp of web development or app development to join us more, so please be sure to sign up.
developer.experience: You should have at least basic software development experience, or desire to improve yourself by participating in nmTeam development
developer.experience_intro: We are happy to see the improvement of nmTeam members after joining nmTeam, so don't worry about whether your current development level is up to the needs of nmTeam. Be bold, keep an aggressive mind, and see your progress It is the greatest joy for everyone in nmTeam.
developer.title: nmTeam Developer

support.attitude: Have a good attitude towards nmTeam customers
support.attitude_intro: nmTeam customers don't ask easy questions all the time, and I hope you can respond to your users' requests with peace of mind.
support.bill_intro: Dealing with customer service can be a bit tiring at times. nmTeam will look into awarding bonuses to our service team members based on service as an incentive.
support.part_time_intro: nmTeam does not require you to devote time to providing services, only when you want to change your mood, you can view the help that nmTeam users need. Emergency services will be directly handled by nmTeam management, no worries.
support.title: Customer Support

writer.english: Mastering a certain foreign language is preferred
writer.knowledge: Have an in-depth understanding of nmTeam's product features and related planning, which can convey nmTeam's values ​​in a simple way and bring positive guidance
writer.lan_level: Have basic literary literacy, be able to write clear copy without language errors and punctuation errors
writer.lan_level_intro: If you can do it well, we will treat you well.
writer.title: Operation

join_requirement_page.language_request: We only recruit members who can communicate with each other fluently in Chinese now.

resources.nmteam_member_rules: nmTeam member work and management rules (Under development)
resources.title: Related information

join_requirement_page.publicity: nmTeam joining rules are being announced and may be revised at any time. Please send feedback to nmTeam via email: support@nmteam.xyz
join_requirement_page.title: Welcome to join nmTeam!

page.tip: Browse nmTeam website in a language that you are familiar with. Some content may not be displayed in the language you selected.
page.title: Change Language

page_not_found.img_title: The code 404 means that the page you are looking for is not found.
page_not_found.title: Page Not Found

pagebases.site_intro: nmTeam is a team that makes nmProducts to the world with incredible thoughts.

products.explain: Explanation: Only display nmTeam products available in your country or region. To view nmTeam products available in other countries or regions, please change the language of the nmTeam website. Try to set the language to simplified Chinese to get the most results.

features.content_1: nmBot is equipped |with lots of functions, |from managing groups |to operating channels, |even for your |personal account, |there are functions |that will make you shine.

group_features.cl: Limit group members to use commands
group_features.rc: Automatically reply to bound channel posts

features.its_only_part: * Only some highlights are displayed here. Some functions may need to meet the conditions before they can be used.

special.content_0: Super exclusive features| help you activate the group and chat happily.
special.content_1: This is just a small part!| There are more features |waiting for you to explore.

feature_1.content: Use salty or sweet language |to automatically comment |on new posts |published in the channel. [footer:Posts may need to meet specific conditions before they can be commented on. ]
feature_1.title: Proper Warm Up

feature_2.content: Automatically identify |the channel owner's identity. |When using channel identity, |you can still freely |use various nmBot functions. [footer: nmBot needs to be set as the administrator of the channel. ]
feature_2.title: Channel Perspective Eye

feature_3.content: Don't like the default commands, |want to add your own ones? |Customize "Command Mapping" |to let nmBot recognize |your custom commands.
feature_3.title: Command Mapping

feature_4.content: With Telegram Business, |not only groups, |but also your private messages |can be connected to keyword replies, |to let nmBot send replies, |delete messages, |and even ban users on your behalf[footer: Commercial keyword replies do not support banning users. ]. |And there are even more options |for customization.
feature_4.title: Keyword Reply

feature_5.content: Let nmBot automatically remind you |that the giveaway activity |of the channel you participated in |has ended, so that |you can quickly view the results |or exit the channel.
feature_5.title: Giveaway Tracking

special.title: And exclusive

features.title: Functions are rich

first_intro.content_1: Imagine a robot like this: |it can manage groups with ease |and make chats live.
first_intro.title:
Funny while chatting.
Powerful when using.

footer_notes.0: All content is for reference only, functions may change, please refer to actual use.

intelligence.chat_content_1: <igt>nmBot Intelligence Chat</igt>| is a personal assistant built into nmBot| and nmBot panels|, making managing nmBot groups| and personal configuration| unprecedentedly simple.
intelligence.content_1: Fully serve nmBot's next-generation intelligence assistant.
intelligence.content_2: nmBot intelligence brings all-round upgrades to nmBot |driven |<igt>nmBot Intelligence Chat, |<igt>nmartChat+</igt>, |<igt>Proper Warm Up</igt>, |<igt>Anti-Spam</igt>| and more functions.
intelligence.content_coming_soon: The first batch of features are now available

feature_1.content: Just say "Let newcomers be required to |subscribe to my channel |@nmbotchannel, and the first day |of joining the group|is not allowed to post pictures", |nmBot Intelligence will know |that you need to enable |the two functions of "Join Verification"| and "New Member Permission Restriction"|, and configure it for you; | Say "Set between 11:00 pm and 8:00 am |not allowed to post pictures and videos", |nmBot Intelligence will add corresponding timing tasks for you.
feature_1.title: Group configuration management

feature_2.content: You can ask nmBot Intelligence Chat |how to use various nmBot functions. |In the future, nmBot smart chat| will also be combined with nmBot help document| and other functions to provide more help to users.
feature_2.title: Fully loaded with nmTeam knowledge

feature_3.content: nmBot Intelligence Chat| is both available in the Telegram bot |and nmBot panel, and is closely integrated |with various nmBot functions |to create a more comfortable user experience for nmBot.
feature_3.title: At your fingertips

intelligence.other_1: <igt>nmartChat+</igt> is another evolution of nmBot |'s unique smart chat function: |on the basis of retaining nmartChat's |unique chat style|, |nmartChat+| brings a better understanding |of the chat content, |and automatically selects |a more appropriate time to reply. |<igt>Proper Warm Up</igt>| and <igt>Anti-Spam</igt> functions| will also be upgraded.
intelligence.other_coming_soon: Will be launched later this year

nmbot_plus.content_0: This premium subscription |for groups and individual users |brings over 20 |premium services |to nmBot. |83% of active groups |can subscribe to nmBot+ |for only $0.4 per month[footer:The statistics of active groups in November 2024 show that groups in this proportion can enjoy nmBot+ equivalent to $0.4 per month. ], |making this subscription |affordable for more people.

feature_1.content: Group owners can set administrators' modification permissions to nmBot settings, making it easier to manage administrators.
feature_1.title: Administrator permissions control

feature_2.content: Customize the bot commands displayed in the group to enable the functions in a targeted manner.
feature_2.title: Customized command list

feature_3.content: More optional operation time, |custom verification text, |limit join time, |custom spam rules and other functions |help you control group entry users.
feature_3.title: Join verification

feature_4.content: Customize the call words |and receive prompts in private messages.
feature_4.title: Call group administrators

feature_5.content: Custom spam rules allow the group |to have its own |spam interception logic; |Scheduled tasks support sending messages regularly |in the group; |and |Several limit unlocking| makes the nmBot experience |more comfortable.
feature_5.title: More benefits

nmbot_plus.title:
nmBot, ，
super discount |advanced service.

nmbot_telegram.page_description:
Get to know one of the most powerful group management bots on Telegram.
nmBot is equipped with numerous group and channel management functions, brings new experiences to groups through various entertainment functions, and has been trusted by tens of thousands of groups.

feature_1.content: As a Telegram mini App, |you can easily |open the nmBot panel |by clicking |in Telegram.
feature_1.title: Simply start it in Telegram

feature_2.content: You can also |use the nmBot panel |in the browser |and enjoy the convenient experience |brought by the exclusive |parallel view.
feature_2.title: Or if you want a large screen

feature_3.content: The simple and clear |nmBot panel setting interface |makes all the functions |easy to understand. |Click, done.
feature_3.title: One-click setting, easy to get started

panel.simplified_content_1: The days of checking |meaningless options |one by one, |sending commands |to set functions frantically, |and typing super-complex codes |for a message are over.
panel.simplified_content_2: With nmBot Panel, |modifying group configuration |becomes as easy as |turning on airplane mode.
panel.title: nmBot Panel

resources.channel_content: Subscribe to the nmBot channel |to get the latest news about nmBot.
resources.community_content: Join the nmBot User Community |to communicate with other nmBot users.
resources.content_0: Check the latest announcements |and learn about usage tips.
resources.documentation_content: View nmBot Help Document |and learn about the ways to use nmBot.
resources.newsroom_content: View the latest news releases |concerning nmBot in nmTeam Newsroom.
resources.title: nmBot Resources

nmbot_telegram.title: nmBot Telegram

usage.content_0: A large number |of large groups in Telegram| are all using nmBot |for management, |and all those who have used it| say it is good. [footer:In a user survey conducted in April 2022, nmBot's user satisfaction reached 94%. The data is an estimate. ]

usage.title: The choice of |tens of |thousands of groups

supportus.description: Sponsor nmTeam to help us go further.
supportus.para:
nmTeam believes that its existence brings unique value to people.
If you agree with this, you may wish to sponsor nmTeam so that we can go further.
nmTeam will use these donation funds to For nmTeam's R&D and overhead, or to buy a cup of coffee.
No matter how you support nmTeam, we thank you really much. With your support, we will continue working hard.
supportus.sponsors_info_note:
The names and avatars of nmTeam sponsors listed above are set by them and have nothing to do with nmTeam.
The above sponsorship ways will jump to third-party platforms, nmTeam is not responsible for its content.
supportus.title: Sponsor nmTeam
